steps.expected: Username field, password field, and submit button are visible
steps.observed: Username textbox, Password textbox, and Sign in button all visible

steps.action: Submit login form with seeded admin credentials
steps.expected: Authentication succeeds and redirects to dashboard/admin
steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:3101/admin and authenticated admin UI rendered with username 'admin'

steps.action: Verify session cookie and login response headers
steps.expected: Session cookie set with HttpOnly and SameSite attributes
steps.observed: curl POST /api/auth/login returned 200 with set-cookie headers containing HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login -> 200; browser final URL http://localhost:3101/admin; Set-Cookie present

assertions.title: Invalid password shows error

steps.action: Submit login with valid username and wrong password
steps.expected: Generic auth error shown, URL remains /login, no session cookie
steps.observed: URL remained /login and toast showed 'Invalid username or password', but session cookie is still present

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login -> 401 with body {"error":"Invalid username or password"}; response includes Set-Cookie

assertions.issues: Contract expects no session cookie for invalid login; app sets/retains session cookie (also present when simply visiting /login).

assertions.title: Non-existent username shows error

steps.expected: Same generic error as wrong-password case and no session cookie
steps.observed: Received same error text 'Invalid username or password' and remained on /login, but session cookie is present

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login -> 401 with identical error payload to wrong-password; response includes Set-Cookie

assertions.issues: Contract expects no session cookie for unknown-user auth failure; app sets/retains session cookie.

steps.action: Submit login form with both fields empty
steps.expected: Both field-level validation errors are shown
steps.observed: Displayed 'Username is required' and 'Password is required'

evidence.network: No /api/auth/login request captured before validation errors rendered

steps.expected: Password validation error shown and no auth attempt made
steps.observed: Displayed 'Password is required'; no /api/auth/login request captured at that validation point

evidence.network: No requests captured when checking /api/auth/login immediately after username-only submit

steps.expected: Remember me checkbox and label visible

steps.action: Inspect login form for forgot-password link
steps.expected: Visible link points to forgot-password route

summary: Tested 8 auth login UI assertions: 6 passed and 2 failed. Failing assertions (VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-004) fail contract expectations because session cookies are set/retained on failed login paths despite correct generic error handling.
